title: Buy Books
description: An open source GUI plugin for buying enchanted books
body:
![This project proudly suppports the LGBTQIA+ community](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OakLoaf/OakLoaf/refs/heads/main/assets/pride.png)


### ⚠️ Disclaimer ⚠️

This project will no longer recive updates unless the plugin breaks on newer Minecraft versions or I get a good suggestion to add. 

## Description

Buy Books is an open source GUI plugin for buying enchanted books. It includes all the enchanted books in the game at the maximum level and they are all priced differently based on rarity. Books are bought with emeralds and experience levels. 

To install this plugin in your server all you need to do is download the .jar file and put it in your plugins folder. Once that is done just restart your server. There is no configuration needed. You can do the /buy command in game to pull up the GUI. This plugins was tested and worked on Paper and Purpur 1.20.4 and 1.20.6. All the prices of the books are shown on hover. 

### Editing the Prices.

If you are not satisfied with the prices of the books you will have to edit the code of the plugin and recompile it since there is no configuration file. You can visit the [Github](https://github.com/RabbitTV22/enchantsPlugin) to access a detailed list of instructions.

![Pitcture of the GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc3c400385d2862f57fdf4009652728dfde0d303.png)
